scope.dependency_radius: Prompt ownership docs, standards/checklists, implementation guides, and selected legacy decision targets
constraints: Do not move actual prompt ownership into .dev/standards
Do not retire legacy sources whose hard rules still live only in guides
Preserve a single primary canonical source per rule family
non_goals: No broad document rewrite outside the workflow folder yet

inputs.architecture_target: Normalize landing zones before legacy-decision-to-canonical migration
review_findings: Prompt bodies should be canonical only in .ai
Some DI/profile constraints are still buried only in guides
user_constraints: Continue the workflow on a dedicated branch

steps: Reviewed prompt ownership overlap between .ai and .dev/standards/prompts
Reviewed DI/profile-related standards and guide overlap
Defined canonical ownership rules and Stage 3 preconditions
validation: Prompt content ownership is assigned to .ai only
Guide-only hard-rule gaps are explicitly captured
Mixed rule/tutorial decision families are marked for split migration
deferred_items: Implement standards and guide updates outside the workflow folder

results.summary: Completed Stage 2 landing-zone normalization and recorded the decisions required before legacy decision migration.
